author: @thebonksipper8811
text:
The more I watch this video, the harder it hits...
Imagine your hometown is suddenly attacked. Everyone is scrambling and doing everything they can to fight the invading forces back or even just survive. Buildings that you've frequented plenty of times are suddenly reduced to rubble. Bright flashing and a deafening cacophony of noise is coming from every direction. There are times when you can only helplessly watch as a wave of death and destruction hurtles towards you. Someone you know explodes in a storm of fire, blood, and limbs right in front of you. You can't believe it - they were healthy and moving around just a second ago and now they're just... gone. Forever. You're terrified that you might be next, that all of a sudden your vision is suddenly going to go black right in the middle of doing something. You don't know if you'll make it out alive or if you and your loved ones will meet again. Even if you somehow did, you'd never be the same person again. That day - all the carnage, death, and destruction you witness - would be burned into your mind, tormenting your thoughts for the rest of your life.
